aboutTeaser.title: A one-man
aboutTeaser.body: I'm Yossi — developer, marketer, and former lecturer at Israel's John Bryce college. Building fast Next.js sites and growing local businesses in Israel and the US since 2017. You work directly with me, not with an account manager forwarding messages.

faq.title: The questions
faq.subtitle: Pricing, timelines, how we work — everything upfront, in plain English.

items.q: How long before I see SEO results?
items.a: Initial improvement in 2–4 months. In highly competitive markets (US locksmiths, garage door) meaningful results take 6–12 months of consistent work. I don't promise magic — just a methodology that works.

Static Next.js sites start at $2,500 and scale with scope. Monthly Local SEO from $500/month. Paid ads — 10–15% management fee on ad spend. Every quote is tailored after a discovery call, never a generic package.

Static Next.js loads in milliseconds, hits PSI 95+ out of the box, and has no WordPress-style security holes. Hosting is free or near-free (Cloudflare Pages), content updates ship via Git, and you fully own the codebase.

items.q: What's GEO and does it actually matter?
items.a: Generative Engine Optimization — being cited by Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude. When a prospect asks 'who's the best locksmith in Colorado?', GEO-ready brands are the ones quoted. It's already happening, and it's growing fast.

items.q: Do you work with clients abroad?
items.a: Yes — more than half my clients are in the US (Maryland, Colorado, Florida, Hawaii). English support, English reporting, and Zoom calls on your timezone. Deep specialty in locksmiths and garage door techs.

No annual contracts. Monthly Local SEO — cancel with 30 days notice. Website builds — milestone-based (50% to start, 50% on delivery). You own the code, the domain, and every account. No vendor lock-in.
I maintain WordPress for legacy clients, but new sites I build exclusively in Next.js. It's better for everyone — faster, more secure, cheaper to maintain.

Yes. PSI 95+ mobile performance is guaranteed in writing — if I don't hit it within 30 days of launch, full refund. I don't guarantee search rankings (nobody honest can), but I guarantee the methodology and transparent monthly reporting.
